title: sideranthus serratus
intro: Sideranthus serratus, also known as Yellow Buttons or Coast Range Buttons, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Sideranthus serratus include reducing inflammation, fighting off bacteria and fungi, and promoting wound healing. Sideranthus serratus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal creams and ointments to aid in the treatment of various health conditions.
